description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Stable Compilation that runs on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. The workflow uses a matrix strategy to compile and test the project on multiple Linux distributions, including Ubuntu 18.04, Debian 10, Ubuntu 20.04, and Debian 11, with different versions of CMake, GCC, and SDL. For each distribution, it installs dependencies, clones the repository, compiles the project, installs it, and runs tests.
